html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights

The Sanguine Experiment is a feature exclusive to the Hallowed Nights event in Don't Starve Together. It can be conducted at the Mad Scientist Lab, using a Mosquito and a Red Cap, and depleting 10 for the player. The experiment has a 66% chance to result in a Flask of Sanguine Mixture and a 33% to result in a Canteen of Sanguine Mixture.

Both potions restore the players' Health upon consumption and slowly over time. The Flask initially restores 8 upon consumption, while the Canteen restores 20 upon consumption. During the next minute, both potions restore 1 every two seconds, adding up to a additional restoration of 30 . Both potions can also be used as Fire Fuel.

Multiple potions are produced when crafting. For Flask potion, there is chance 20% to craft 3 of them, 60% to craft 4 and 20% to craft 5. For Canteen potion, there is chance 20% to craft 1 of them, 60% to craft 2 and 20% to craft 3.

Trivia

  • The Mad Scientist Lab and all related craftable Items were introduced to the Hallowed Nights event in 2018.
  • When Wormwood consumes either of these potions, he does NOT receive the initial 8 / 20 , but will still restore 1 every two seconds, resulting in a total restoration of 30 .

Gallery

  • All Hallowed Nights potions except for the Steeped Lunar Essence on the ground.
  • Concept art for various potions from Rhymes with Play #212.

Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Hallowed Nights
“I was hoping for something bigger.”
–Wilson, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“I wish it was a little stronger.”
–Willow, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“Is okay, but big Wolfgang need big drink!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“Like life, it's a bit disappointing.”
–Wendy, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“SMALL UPGRADE”
–WX-78, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“Not as potent as I would have liked.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“Not bad.”
–Woodie, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“Could be a little stronger.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“A meager reward för my tröubles.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“It's only a little powerful.”
–Webber, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“I don't think it'll do much.”
–Warly, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“Little thing for belly”
–Wormwood, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“Aw, I was hoping for a little more.”
–Winona, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“How tame and timid!”
–Wortox, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“Didn't turn out so good...”
–Wurt, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“It didn't turn out quite as well as I thought it would.”
–Walter, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
“I'm a clocksmith, not a chemist.”
–Wanda, when examining a Flask of Sanguine Mixture.
The Sanguine Experiment is a feature exclusive to the Hallowed Nights event in Don't Starve Together. It can be conducted at the Mad Scientist Lab, using a Mosquito and a Red Cap, and depleting 10 for the player. The experiment has a 66% chance to result in a Flask of Sanguine Mixture and a 33% to result in a Canteen of Sanguine Mixture.
Both potions restore the players' Health upon consumption and slowly over time. The Flask initially restores 8 upon consumption, while the Canteen restores 20 upon consumption. During the next minute, both potions restore 1 every two seconds, adding up to a additional restoration of 30 . Both potions can also be used as Fire Fuel.
Multiple potions are produced when crafting. For Flask potion, there is chance 20% to craft 3 of them, 60% to craft 4 and 20% to craft 5. For Canteen potion, there is chance 20% to craft 1 of them, 60% to craft 2 and 20% to craft 3.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Mad Scientist Lab and all related craftable Items were introduced to the Hallowed Nights event in 2018.
When Wormwood consumes either of these potions, he does NOT receive the initial 8 / 20 , but will still restore 1 every two seconds, resulting in a total restoration of 30 .

All Hallowed Nights potions except for the Steeped Lunar Essence on the ground.
Concept art for various potions from Rhymes with Play #212.
